# Evidence Pack: Strongest Commercially Viable Restaurant Direct-Channel Offer

**Decision supported:** Determine the smallest useful sellable offer, logical package ladder, bundle/add-on boundaries, segment fit, recurring-responsibility implications, safe promises, and pricing-model direction without final public prices.
**Created:** 2026-06-13
**Query budget used:** 1 conservatively counted attempt / 25
**Notebook boundaries used/excluded:** Selected all four boundaries because each request cluster maps to a distinct registered notebook. Only Restaurant Website ROI Research was attempted; the other three were excluded from execution after the required immediate stop on access/connectivity blocker.

## Executive Evidence Summary

No source-grounded evidence was returned. The first targeted query failed with `WinError 10061: No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it`. Execution stopped immediately; no verdict is supported by this pack.
